title: Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim
tagline: Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim — heritage city of Goa

heroImage.alt: Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim, Goa

overview.short: The Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim in India, also known as Fort St.
overview.description: The Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim in India, also known as Fort St. James Banastarim or Benastari Castle, is located at on the right bank of Cumbarjua Canal, on the eastern tip of Old Goa, North Goa district in the state of Goa on the west coast of India.

topPlaces.name: Adcolna
topPlaces.description: Adcolna is a village in Ponda taluka, Goa, India. It is part of the Bhoma-Adconla village panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Tivrem
topPlaces.description: Tivrem is a village in the Ponda taluka (sub-district) of Goa, India.

topPlaces.name: Boma (Ponda)
topPlaces.description: Boma is a village in the Ponda taluka (sub-district) of Goa. It is located in the northern part of Ponda taluka.

topPlaces.name: Orgao
topPlaces.description: Orgao is a village in Ponda taluka, North Goa district in the Indian state of Goa. For the purposes of the census, it is considered a "Census Town".

topPlaces.name: Marcel, Goa
topPlaces.description: Marcel, also known as Mashel, is a village-turned-census town in the Ponda Sub-District, North Goa in the state of Goa, India. It is located in the Novas Conquistas region of the state.

topPlaces.name: Cumbarjua Canal
topPlaces.description: The Cumbarjua Canal is a distributary channel formed by the merger of the Mandovi and Zuari rivers in Goa, India. Its flow has led to the formation of river deltas; the most prominent of them are Ilhas de Goa, Cumbarjua and St Estevam.

topPlaces.name: Carambolim
topPlaces.description: Carambolim, also called Karmali, is a village in North Goa district, Goa, India.

topPlaces.name: Candola
topPlaces.description: Candola is a village and census town in Ponda Sub-District, North Goa district in the state of Goa, India. It is located in the Novas Conquistas region of the state.

items.note: Adcolna is a village in Ponda taluka, Goa, India. It is part of the Bhoma-Adconla village panchayat.
Tivrem is a village in the Ponda taluka (sub-district) of Goa, India.
Boma is a village in the Ponda taluka (sub-district) of Goa. It is located in the northern part of Ponda taluka.
Orgao is a village in Ponda taluka, North Goa district in the Indian state of Goa. For the purposes of the census, it is considered a "Census Town".
Marcel, also known as Mashel, is a village-turned-census town in the Ponda Sub-District, North Goa in the state of Goa, India. It is located in the Novas Conquistas region of the state.

The Cumbarjua Canal is a distributary channel formed by the merger of the Mandovi and Zuari rivers in Goa, India. Its flow has led to the formation of river deltas; the most prominent of them are Ilhas de Goa, Cumbarjua and St Estevam.
Carambolim, also called Karmali, is a village in North Goa district, Goa, India.
Candola is a village and census town in Ponda Sub-District, North Goa district in the state of Goa, India. It is located in the Novas Conquistas region of the state.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim?
faq.a: The best time to visit Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (18 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim?
faq.a: Stays in Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Fort of São Tiago of Banastarim?
faq.a: The top attractions are Adcolna, Tivrem, Boma (Ponda), Orgao, Marcel, Goa.
